operations.name: select_serum_preset
verify: preset name changed or selected preset is highlighted
no account or license dialog is blocking
MIDI note playback produces meter activity

operations.name: set_macro
verify: mapped parameter change is visible or readable

operations.name: set_live_panel_parameter
verify: parameter is exposed in Live panel

operations.name: set_serum_gui_knob
verify: target UI was visible before drag
knob or handle position changed after drag
no accidental tab or preset change occurred

operations.name: render_audio_preview
verify: render path matches the confirmed destination

done_when: requested or close preset is selected
MIDI note playback shows meter activity
filter_cutoff changes from low to high
values are confirmed by screenshot or Live panel readback
sound intent is translated to structured parameters
macro or Live panel edits are applied

ui_not_found.action: retry screenshot, refocus Ableton, show plug-in window, then stop if target remains invisible

wrong_window.action: activate Ableton and select SERUM_AGENT before continuing

drag_inaccurate.action: use Rack Macro or Live panel fallback before another GUI drag

parameter_not_exposed.action: enter Configure Mode only when safe, expose the parameter, then prefer Live panel control

audio_silent.action: check track arm, MIDI clip, device power, output routing, and meter activity

modal_dialog.action: stop and ask for confirmation when destructive, account-related, license-related, payment-related, or otherwise unexpected
